channel.title: openapi-spec Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the openapi-spec codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: ApiContract Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: Defines the public interfaces and data schemas for the Supermodel ecosystem using OpenAPI specifications. Architectural overview of the ApiContract domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: BuildManifest Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: Handles the packaging and distribution configuration for the specification as an npm dependency. Architectural overview of the BuildManifest domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: package.json — openapi-spec Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
